summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Smart File Manager web application. Backend APIs working perfectly (18/18 tests passed). Frontend UI testing shows excellent macOS Finder-like implementation with all major features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Context menu creates overlay that blocks body clicks temporarily
ui_bugs.impact: Minor UX issue - overlay prevents immediate clicking elsewhere after right-click

ui_bugs.issue: DOM element attachment error during rapid multiple file selection
ui_bugs.impact: Occasional error during fast Ctrl+click operations, likely React re-rendering issue

passed_tests: App loads with proper macOS Finder-like UI
Sidebar with collapsible sections (Favoris, Cet Appareil, Tags, Stockage)
All 4 view modes work (Icons, List, Columns, Gallery)
Breadcrumb navigation displays and is clickable
Theme toggle cycles through light/dark/system modes
Context menu appears on right-click with correct options
Status bar shows item count and selection count
Quick Look opens with Space key and closes with Escape
Sidebar navigation items work (Images, Documents, etc.)
CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete files)
